name: rhie-integration-platform
description: Medisoft RHIE Integration Platform — autonomous background services for Medisoft ↔ Rwanda HIE synchronization

scripts.clean: find packages apps services -name tsconfig.tsbuildinfo -delete && rm -rf packages/*/dist apps/*/dist services/*/dist
scripts.verify:build: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test -w @rhie/service-client-registry && npm run test -w @rhie/service-encounter-id && npm run test -w @rhie/config && npm run test -w @rhie/environment-discovery
scripts.dev:coordinator: npm run build && npm run start -w @rhie/coordinator
scripts.dev:replication-monitor: npm run build && npm run start -w @rhie/replication-monitor-app
scripts.dev:worker-host: npm run build && npm run start -w @rhie/worker-host
scripts.dev:client-host: npm run build && SERVICE_NAME=client-registry-host WORKER_TYPES=client-registry HEALTH_PORT=9091 npm run start -w @rhie/worker-host
scripts.dev:encounter-host: npm run build && SERVICE_NAME=encounter-id-host WORKER_TYPES=encounter-id HEALTH_PORT=9092 npm run start -w @rhie/worker-host
scripts.dev:visit-host: npm run build && SERVICE_NAME=visit-encounter-host WORKER_TYPES=visit-encounter HEALTH_PORT=9093 npm run start -w @rhie/worker-host
scripts.dev:transfer-host: npm run build && SERVICE_NAME=transfer-encounter-host WORKER_TYPES=transfer-encounter HEALTH_PORT=9094 npm run start -w @rhie/worker-host
scripts.dev:observation-host: npm run build && SERVICE_NAME=observation-host WORKER_TYPES=observation HEALTH_PORT=9095 npm run start -w @rhie/worker-host
